sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n27222" key="*dio/pais" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Δῐό-παις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">παιδος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n27222.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">son of Zeus,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
